title: Implement debounce with cancel
prompt: Create debounce.mjs exporting debounce(fn, ms): returns a debounced function; rapid calls collapse to one trailing invocation with the LAST arguments. The returned function has a .cancel() method that drops any pending call.

grade.command: node -e "import('./debounce.mjs').then(m=>{let calls=[];const d=m.debounce((v)=>calls.push(v),25);d(1);d(2);d(3);setTimeout(()=>{if(calls.join(',')!=='3')throw new Error('trailing '+calls);const e=m.debounce((v)=>calls.push(v),25);e(9);e.cancel();setTimeout(()=>{if(calls.join(',')!=='3')throw new Error('cancel '+calls);console.log('ok')},60)},60)})"
